TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Paul_Arizin, title = Paul_Arizin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paul_Arizin} }

S.FORM: Paul Arizin sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1928, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 4, Wilt Chamberlain, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2006) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Paul Arizin sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1928, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 4, Wilt Chamberlain, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2006) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: paul arizin s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, wilt ʦ~ʨħamβerlain, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
